description: WebKit web view. Requires iOS 26+ / macOS 26+; shows a fallback label on older OS. Load via url or inline html.

url.description: Initial URL to load; takes precedence over html

html.description: Inline HTML to render when url is absent

baseURL.description: Base URL for resolving relative links in html

customUserAgent.description: Overrides the default WebKit user agent string

backForwardNavigationGestures.description: Enable swipe back/forward gestures; default true

linkPreviews.description: Enable long-press link previews; default true

limitsNavigationsToAppBoundDomains.description: Restrict navigation to app-bound domains; default false

upgradeKnownHostsToHTTPS.description: Auto-upgrade known HTTP hosts to HTTPS; default false

userScripts.description: JS descriptors injected before/after page load

forMainFrameOnly.description: When false, inject into all frames; default false

value.description: Current page URL; write a URL string to navigate, or '#goBack'/'#goForward'/'#reload'/'#stop'

states.title.description: Page <title> text; absent until first load completes

states.isLoading.description: true while a navigation is in flight
